context.description:
### Zines by Jackie is an in-development hub for zines, activities, and resources about technology, art, design, and more. Inspired by the positive reception of my [Making a Website Zine](https://jackieis.online/projects/making-a-website-by-you-and-for-you-zine "Making a Website Zine"), I'm currently working to create a larger [zine](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Zine "Zine - Wikipedia Link") series on topics related to technology, with each zine complemented by online resources and activities. ![shop preview](//images.ctfassets.net/t9p4c9x03bar/7byPs717H5WRPXlfqcbacG/4440535fe1aa1b28c2e92df5992c8a75/shopPreview.png) The Zines by Jackie website will function as an online shop to purchase Risograph printed zines, as well as a center for digital learning resources - such as design brainstorming activities, resource compilations, and beginner-friendly starter code.

![1D6A9087-smaller](//images.ctfassets.net/t9p4c9x03bar/2BAnAEau9s9OD4Kr3Ft4CB/ddc2e8d4bdeba5ce7f269c12ce7bcce1/1D6A9087-smaller.jpg)

Combining what I've learned across the tech, design, and art worlds, Zines by Jackie is my personal response to seeing a need for more holistic, socially-centered ways of learning about, and with, technology. __Check back soon (~October 2020) to buy zines and explore activities when Zines by Jackie launches!__
context.title: Zines by Jackie
